parameters.query: INSERT INTO users (chat_id, first_name, username, status) VALUES ({{ $json.chat_id }}, '{{ $json.first_name }}', '{{ $json.username }}', 'pending') ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT status FROM users WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }};
